_comment: Hurl entries known to fail because of a documented Noda gap. Each key is a stable identifier from the Hurl report (see internal/testing/realworld). Update ONLY alongside a FINDINGS.md row + a GitHub issue. NOTE: the key is position-based (entry N / line L), so a GREEN gap only guarantees the entry still fails — not that it fails for the SAME reason; the gate logs the live assert message as 'known-gap ...', so scan CI output if a gap's root cause might have shifted.

_issues._comment: gap key -> chimpanze/noda issue number tracking the underlying Noda limitation. See examples/realworld/FINDINGS.md for the full writeup.
